title: Project Document Workspace
concept: A document-style WordPress Playground workspace where launch sources, save state, Site Manager tools, catalog browsing, and import/export actions are organized as inline project sections with a command/search overlay and live results pane.
focus: complete visible save and launch sequence
dense Blueprint catalog with selected detail
flows: Select a launch route, view route-specific inputs, run the command, and see current-site replacement consequences.
Choose Save in this browser or Save to a local directory, run progress, and see the saved identity update.
Open saved Playground management, rename the saved project, and surface delete consequences.
Use Site Manager document sections for settings, file browser, blueprint bundle, database tools, and logs.
Search and filter Blueprint catalog entries, select a Blueprint, inspect details, and run it.
Review GitHub export, zip download, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and zip import replacement consequences.
featureCoverage: create a vanilla WordPress Playground
preview a WordPress PR
preview a Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
run a Blueprint URL
import a .zip archive
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
select featured Blueprint shortcuts
save temporary Playground in browser storage
save to a local directory
see save progress and resulting saved state
browse unsaved and saved Playgrounds
rename a saved Playground
delete a saved Playground with consequence copy
navigate and refresh active WordPress paths
open Homepage and WP Admin
edit WordPress version, PHP version, language, network, older versions, and multisite settings
understand destructive reset and stored reload behavior
use File browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
download database.sqlite
open Adminer and phpMyAdmin
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs
export to GitHub
download the current Playground as .zip
